immediate.title: A Cyber Force With No Enlisted? Not So Fast, Some Experts Say
immediate.summary: Calls for the creation of a dedicated cyber-focused military service are gaining traction among some cyber advocates and lawmakers. But a recent think tank report adds a twist to that push—calling for a so-called Cyber Force to have no enlisted personnel. It’s an idea some experts say misses the mark at a critical time when debate on how to shape a potential service is still being shaped. The post A Cyber Force With No Enlisted?
